title: Masdar and OMV Advance Partnership on Green Hydrogen Development
content: Masdar, the UAEâ€™s clean energy leader, and OMV, Austriaâ€™s integrated chemicals, fuels and energy company, have signed an agreement to partner in the production of green hydrogen, synthetic sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF), and other sustainable products. Agreement covers potential opportunities in Austria, the UAE and in Central and Northern Europe for the production of green hydrogen and its derivatives.
author: Analysts Account
